_note: DB security group attached to Aurora cluster AND to smartlift-ai-scorer's VPC config. CRITICAL FINDING.
_CRITICAL_FINDING: Postgres port 5432 is open to the entire internet. Combined with master credentials in env vars and code, this is the highest-priority security issue. Lock down to specific Lambda egress IPs (or move Lambda back into VPC) immediately.
_PORT_80_FINDING: Why is port 80 open to the world on the DB SG? No HTTP service should be running here.
_PORT_22_FINDING: Single static IP for SSH (52.95.4.19) — that's an AWS IP range. If this is for SSM Session Manager or CloudShell, prefer a VPC endpoint over a fixed IP.
